chart-desc: Waxay ku dartaa shaqada falanqeeye {{#chart:}} ee lagu soo bandhigo jaantusyo
chart-error-chart-definition-invalid: Bogga qeexidda jaantuska waa khalad ama aan ansax ahayn.
chart-error-data-source-invalid: Xogta jadwalka ee la bixiyay waa khalad ama aan ansax ahayn.
chart-error-default-source-not-specified: Bogga qeexidda jaantuska ma qeexin il xogeed caadi ah.
chart-error-incompatible-chart-definitio: Bogga qeexidda jaantuska lama jaanqaadi karo jaantusyada.
chart-error-incompatible-data-source: Bogga isha xogta jadwalka lama jaanqaadi karo jaantusyada.
chart-error-invalid-data-source: Bogga isha xogta jadwalka waa aan ansax ahayn.
chart-error-invalid-height: Dhererku waa inuu ahaadaa tiro dhan oo ka weyn ama la mid ah 100.
chart-error-invalid-width: Ballaca waa inuu ahaadaa tiro dhan oo ka weyn ama la mid ah 100.
chart-error-shell-disabled: Jaantusyada lama soo bandhigi karo sababtoo ah shell execution waa la damiyay.
chart-error-rendering-error: Waxaa dhacay qalad markii la isku dayay in la soo bandhigo jaantuska.
chart-error-unexpected: Waxaa dhacay qalad lama filaan ah markii jaantuska la soo bandhigayay.
chart-error-category: Bogagga adeegsanaya kordhinta Chart oo leh khaladaad soo bandhigid
chart-error-category-desc: Boggu wuxuu ka kooban yahay jaantus leh khaladaad soo bandhigid.
chartjson-error-version: $1 waa inuu noqdaa tiro dhan oo u dhexeeya $2 iyo $3.
chartjson-error-enum: $1 waa inuu noqdaa mid ka mid ah qiimayaasha soo socda: $2
chart-error-source-not-found: Bogga isha xogta jadwalka lama helin.
chart-error-invalid-source-type: Bogga isha xogta jadwalka waa nooc aan sax ahayn.
chart-error-invalid-source-content: Waxyaabaha ku jira bogga isha xogta jadwalka waa khaldan yihiin.
chart-error-transforms-disabled: Isbeddellada xogta jadwalka waa la damiyay.
chart-error-request-too-large: Chart iyo xogta jadwalku waxay ka badan yihiin cabbirka ugu badan ee la oggol yahay ee $1 baytyada. Fadlan isticmaal dataset yar ama ka fiirso [https://www.mediawiki.org/wiki/Extension:Chart/Transforms xulashooyinka isbeddelka xogta] si aad u shaandhayso ama u soo koobto xogta.
chart-error-switchable-string: Halbeegga "$1" waa inuu noqdaa xaraf ama shay u dhigma koodhadhka luqadaha saxda ah oo mid kasta uu yahay hal sadar oo aan ka badnayn $2 {{PLURAL:$2|xaraf|xarafo}}, iyadoo aan lahayn tab ama meel bannaan oo dhammaadka ah, tusaale: <kbd>{ "en":"Qoraal Ingiriisi ah", ... }</kbd>
apihelp-chartinfo-summary: Soo celi tirada hadda ee isticmaalka gaarka ah ee bogagga Chart. Isticmaal badan oo isla chart ah oo ku jira isla bogga waxaa loo tiriyaa hal isticmaal.
apihelp-chartinfo-param-global: U deji true si loo daro dhammaan wiki-yada isku xiran halkii laga isticmaali lahaa wiki-ga deegaanka oo keliya.
apihelp-chartinfo-example-1: Soo qaad tirada jaantusyada wiki-ga maxalliga ah.
apihelp-chartinfo-example-2: Soo qaad tirada jaantusyada dhammaan wiki-yada.
